questionText: A savings account is opened with an initial deposit of \$6{,}500. choices.text: 4 years after the initial deposit, the amount of money, in dollars, in the account is 7,038.57.
Every 4 years, the amount of money, in dollars, in the account increases by 7,038.57.
4 years after the initial deposit, the amount of money, in dollars, in the account has increased by 7,038.57.
Every 4 years, the amount of money, in dollars, in the account decreases by 7,038.57.
